title: The Fear of God and God's Blessings
reading:
Scripture repeatedly associates the fear of God with blessing. These blessings are not always material. They include peace, guidance, protection, favor, and intimacy with God.

God takes special notice of those who fear Him. The fear of God positions us under His loving care.
reflection:
What blessings has God already given you?

Do you value spiritual blessings above material ones?

How has God shown faithfulness in your life?
abide: Thank You for Your kindness toward those who fear Your name.
